continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends far-future Legacy comics era covering Star Wars: Legacy volume 1 with Cade Skywalker, Darth Krayt's One Sith, the Fel Empire, Galactic Alliance Remnant, Jedi survivors, and Legacy volume 2 with Ania Solo and late Sith/Imperial Knight fallout. Excludes Disney canon sequel-era material and earlier post-Endor novel arcs except as historical background or future guards.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Use as a far-future Legends branch. Do not stack as a direct sequel-state for Disney canon or for unresolved custom post-Endor branches unless the story explicitly chooses the Legacy comics trajectory.
